criteria.description: Every expanded shape and span source/covered count matches the bounded inventory.
The answer explicitly preserves page-wide table selection, header-inclusive rows, expanded-grid cells, non-repeated span sources, and per-axis covered coordinates.
The answer exposes no page or cell content, URL, style value, raw attribute, or warning text.
Only capability discovery and the content-free summary route are used.
The response contains only the requested structural result.
